summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V9 features: Portfolio Optimizer (Black-Litterman), Risk Trends, and Email Digest. All 15 requested test scenarios passed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and interactions working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/portfolio-optimizer/assets returns 8 bond assets with symbol, name, category fields - PASSED
2. POST /api/portfolio-optimizer/optimize with views returns allocations, optimal_portfolio, min_variance, max_sharpe, efficient_frontier - PASSED
3. POST /api/portfolio-optimizer/optimize without views returns market equilibrium optimization - PASSED
4. Portfolio Optimizer page at /portfolio-optimizer loads with Investor Views panel, Parameters panel, and Run Optimization button - PASSED
5. Portfolio Optimizer shows BL Optimal, Max Sharpe, Min Variance summary cards after running optimization - PASSED
6. Portfolio Optimizer shows Optimal Asset Allocation bar chart and Efficient Frontier scatter plot after optimization - PASSED
7. GET /api/risk-trends returns array of risk snapshots - PASSED
8. POST /api/risk-trends/snapshot saves a new risk snapshot and returns saved:true - PASSED
9. Risk Analytics page shows Risk Metric Trends section with metric selector (VaR/Vol/Sharpe/DD/Value) and 7D/30D/90D period buttons - PASSED
10. GET /api/email-digest/preferences returns default preferences with digest_enabled, digest_email, include_* fields - PASSED
12. POST /api/email-digest/send triggers email sending and returns sent status with email_id - PASSED
13. Risk Analytics page shows Email Digest Settings panel with enable toggle, email input, include toggles, save and send buttons - PASSED
14. Risk Analytics page shows Digest Send History panel - PASSED
15. Dashboard navigation dropdown includes 'Portfolio Optimizer' link - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: PortfolioOptimizer class correctly implements Black-Litterman optimization with 8 bond assets (UST_2Y, UST_5Y, UST_10Y, UST_30Y, TIPS, IG_CORP, HY_CORP, MBS)
BL optimization computes implied equilibrium returns (pi = delta * Sigma * w_mkt), applies investor views via Bayesian updating, and generates optimal/min-var/max-sharpe portfolios
RiskTrendService correctly stores snapshots in MongoDB 'risk_snapshots' collection with proper exclusion of _id field
EmailDigestService uses Resend API with proper async handling via asyncio.to_thread
Email digest generates dark-themed HTML email with inline CSS tables for risk summary, alerts, AI brief, and portfolio snapshot
All new API endpoints require authentication via get_current_user(request)
Dashboard.jsx correctly includes Portfolio Optimizer link in navigation dropdown with data-testid='portfolio-optimizer-nav'
PortfolioOptimizerPage.jsx correctly implements all UI elements: views panel, parameters panel, run optimization button, summary cards, allocation chart, efficient frontier, allocations table
RiskAnalyticsPage.jsx correctly implements risk trends section with metric selector and period buttons, email digest settings panel with all toggles
context_for_next_testing_agent: V9 features fully tested and working: (1) Portfolio Optimizer: GET /api/portfolio-optimizer/assets returns 8 bond assets, POST /api/portfolio-optimizer/optimize with/without views returns full BL optimization result with allocations, optimal_portfolio, min_variance, max_sharpe, efficient_frontier. UI at /portfolio-optimizer has Investor Views panel (data-testid='views-panel'), Parameters panel (data-testid='risk-aversion-panel'), Run Optimization button (data-testid='run-optimize-btn'), and after optimization shows summary cards (data-testid='portfolio-summary'), allocation chart (data-testid='allocation-chart'), efficient frontier (data-testid='efficient-frontier'), allocations table (data-testid='allocation-table'). (2) Risk Trends: GET /api/risk-trends returns array of snapshots, POST /api/risk-trends/snapshot saves snapshot. UI has Risk Metric Trends section (data-testid='risk-trends') with metric selector (data-testid='trend-metric-select') and period buttons (data-testid='trend-days-7/30/90'). (3) Email Digest: GET /api/email-digest/preferences returns default prefs, POST /api/email-digest/preferences saves prefs, POST /api/email-digest/send triggers email (Resend test mode only works with verified email tongyin2020@gmail.com), GET /api/email-digest/history returns logs. UI has Email Digest Settings panel (data-testid='email-digest-config') with enable toggle (data-testid='digest-enabled-toggle'), email input (data-testid='digest-email-input'), include toggles, save button (data-testid='save-email-prefs-btn'), send button (data-testid='send-digest-btn'), and Digest Send History panel (data-testid='digest-history'). (4) Dashboard navigation dropdown includes Portfolio Optimizer link (data-testid='portfolio-optimizer-nav'). All APIs use real yfinance data and GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key. RESEND_API_KEY is configured and working.
